name: MP9 | 残花败藤
collection: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
collectionZh: 2021 炙热沙城 II 收藏品
descriptionEn: Manufactured in Switzerland, the cutting-edge MP9 SMG is an ergonomic polymer weapon favored by private security firms. It has been spray-painted with a vine and flower pattern in various shades of green. Established, seasoned, weathered—you can just say \"old\"
descriptionZh: 由瑞士制造，尖端的 MP9 微型冲锋枪是一把符合人类工效学的聚合物武器，深受私人保安公司青睐。 这把武器采用各种绿色色调的藤蔓和花朵图案进行喷涂。 成年累月，日晒雨淋，饱经风霜——你可以称之为“落叶归根”
